name: Ayurvedic Pinkish Glow Day Cream
description: Premium glow and brightening day cream that supports soft, smooth, and radiant-looking skin with a fresh pinkish glow.
details: Premium Glow & Brightening Formula. Specially formulated to help improve skin glow, brightness, softness, and smoothness while giving skin a fresh, healthy, and radiant look. Regular use helps reduce dullness, tanning, and uneven skin appearance for naturally glowing skin.
highlights: Helps improve skin glow and brightness
Supports soft, smooth, and healthy-looking skin
Helps reduce tanning and dullness
Gives fresh, radiant, and pinkish glow look
Supports hydrated and nourished skin
Visible results in 7 days
Premium formula with amazing results
howToUse: Apply at night on clean and dry skin. Take a slightly thick layer and gently spread evenly all over the face. Do not rub harshly. Avoid excessive sun exposure while using this cream. Leave overnight and wash your face in the morning for fresh glowing skin.
benefits: Improves skin glow and freshness
Supports clean and healthy-looking skin
Helps reduce tanning and dull appearance
Leaves skin soft, smooth, and radiant-looking
warnings: Avoid too much sun exposure for best results. For external use only. Store in a cool and dry place away from direct sunlight.

name: TresGlam Snow White Night Use Cream
description: Advanced whitening and brightening night cream that nourishes, hydrates, and boosts glow for a fresh, radiant complexion.
details: Advanced Whitening & Brightening Formula. Specially formulated to help improve skin brightness, glow, smoothness, and overall skin appearance while you sleep. This luxurious night cream helps nourish dull and tired-looking skin for a fresh, radiant, and healthy-looking complexion.
highlights: Helps improve skin brightness and glow
Supports smooth, soft, and radiant skin
Helps improve uneven skin tone
Deeply nourishes and hydrates skin overnight
Visible results in 7 days
Trusted formula for 15 years
howToUse: Cleanse your face before bedtime. Apply a small quantity evenly on the face and neck and leave overnight. Wash your face in the morning for fresh and glowing skin. Use regularly every night for best results.
benefits: Brightens dull-looking skin
Supports glowing and radiant skin
Helps improve appearance of dark spots and pigmentation
Keeps skin soft, hydrated, and healthy-looking
Refreshes tired-looking skin overnight
warnings: For external use only. Store in a cool and dry place away from direct sunlight.

name: TresGlam Basilque Organic Under Eye Cream
description: Premium under-eye nourishing formula to reduce dark circles, puffiness, and fine lines while keeping the eye area soft and refreshed.
details: Premium Under Eye Nourishing Formula. Specially formulated to help reduce the appearance of dark circles, eye bags, puffiness, and fine lines while keeping the under-eye area soft, hydrated, and refreshed.
highlights: Helps reduce dark circles and puffiness
Supports smooth and youthful-looking under-eye skin
Hydrates and nourishes delicate under-eye area
Cooling and refreshing effect
Night use for best results
howToUse: After cleansing, apply a small quantity gently under and around the eyes and massage softly in circular motions until fully absorbed. Use regularly for best results.
benefits: Helps reduce skin pigmentation around eyes
Supports anti-aging under-eye care
Helps minimize eye bags and wrinkles
Refreshes dull and tired-looking eyes
warnings: For external use only. Store in a cool and dry place away from direct sunlight.

name: TresGlam Herbal Anti-Aging Natural Cream with Vitamin C
description: Premium herbal skin nourishing formula that deeply moisturizes and restores glow for soft, smooth, healthy-looking skin.
details: Premium Herbal Skin Nourishing Formula. A luxurious herbal cream specially crafted to nourish, hydrate, and revitalize the skin. Regular use helps the skin appear soft, smooth, radiant, and healthy-looking.
highlights: Deeply moisturizes the skin
Enhances natural glow
Helps improve skin softness and smoothness
Nourishes dry and dull skin
Enriched with Vitamin C and Vitamin E
Recommended for 30+ age group
Night use for best results
howToUse: Cleanse your face before bedtime. Apply a small quantity gently on face and neck and massage in circular motions until fully absorbed. Use regularly for best results.
note: The PDF lists a shorter ingredient variant without kiwi extract and vitamins. If you need this variant, use folder name tresglam-herbal-anti-aging-natural-cream-short-formula.

name: TresGlam Herbal Lemon Super Pigmentation Cream
description: Advanced night repair and skin renewal formula to reduce pigmentation, even tone, and reveal a brighter complexion.
details: Advanced Night Repair & Skin Renewal Formula. Specially formulated with Lemon Extract and advanced skin renewing ingredients to help remove dull, damaged-looking skin, improve uneven skin tone, and support fresh, glowing, healthy-looking skin.
highlights: Helps improve appearance of pigmentation and dark spots
Supports skin renewal and fresh-looking glow
Helps remove dull and damaged-looking skin
Supports smoother, brighter, and radiant skin
Gentle peeling effect for skin renewal
Visible glow and fresh look in 7 days
Night use only
Daytime sunscreen is compulsory
howToUse: Apply only at night on clean and dry skin. Take a small quantity and apply evenly on the face, avoiding the eye area. Leave overnight and wash your face in the morning.
benefits: Improves skin brightness and glow
Supports smoother and softer-looking skin
Helps reduce appearance of pigmentation and tanning
Supports fresh and healthy-looking skin renewal
Helps improve dull and uneven-looking skin texture
warnings: During daytime, always apply sunscreen while using this cream. For external use only. Patch test recommended before use. Store in a cool and dry place away from direct sunlight.

name: TresGlam Herbal Sunblock Oil Free Cream SPF 30
description: Advanced daily sun protection and glow formula with SPF 30 for lightweight, oil-free protection.
details: Advanced Daily Sun Protection & Glow Formula. Lightweight, oil-free day care cream specially formulated to protect skin from harmful UVA/UVB rays, tanning, pollution, pigmentation, and environmental damage while keeping skin fresh, healthy, and glowing like a mirror.
highlights: Protects skin from sun damage and tanning
Helps prevent pigmentation and dark spots
Gives mirror-like glowing skin
No need of makeup after application
Keeps skin fresh, radiant, and protected all day
Oil-free, lightweight, and non-greasy formula
Day use only
howToUse: Wash your face with face wash. Apply Vitamin C Moisturizing Cream. After moisturizer, apply TresGlam Sunblock evenly on face and neck. Use every morning as the last step of skincare. Reapply if needed during long sun exposure.
warnings: For external use only. Store in a cool and dry place away from direct sunlight.

name: TresGlam Herbal Avocado Whitening Cream
description: Advanced night repair and glow formula to improve skin brightness, hydration, and even tone with avocado extract.
details: Advanced Night Repair & Glow Formula. Specially formulated to help improve skin glow, hydration, uneven skin tone, and the appearance of pigmentation. Enriched with nourishing botanical extracts and vitamins for healthy-looking radiant skin.
highlights: Helps improve skin brightness and glow
Supports soft, smooth, and hydrated skin
Helps reduce dullness and uneven skin tone
Supports healthy-looking radiant skin
Helps improve the appearance of pigmentation
Very good visible results in 7 days
Night use only
howToUse: Apply only at night on clean and dry skin. Take a slightly thick layer and apply evenly on the face, avoiding the eye area. Do not massage. Leave overnight and wash your face in the morning with face wash.
warnings: For external use only. Patch test recommended before use. Store in a cool and dry place away from direct sunlight.

name: TresGlam Kiwi Whitening & Glowing Face Wash
description: Advanced herbal foaming formula for instant brightening, de-tanning, and a fresh glow from the first wash.
details: Advanced Herbal Foaming Formula. Specially designed to deeply cleanse dirt, tanning, excess oil, and dullness while giving skin an instant fresh glow and healthy brightening effect from the very first wash.
highlights: One wash instant visible result
Helps brighten dull and tired-looking skin
Supports whitening and glowing appearance
Deeply removes dirt, tan, and impurities
Gives fresh, smooth, and healthy-looking skin
Oil control formula for daily use
Suitable for all skin types
Men and women both can use
Excellent whitening and glow result
howToUse: Apply on wet face and gently massage for 30-60 seconds. Rinse thoroughly with water. Use twice daily for best results.
benefits: Improves skin glow and freshness
Supports even-looking skin tone
Helps reduce tanning and dullness appearance
Removes excess oil and dirt deeply
Leaves skin soft, clean, and radiant-looking
warnings: For external use only. Store in a cool and dry place away from sunlight.
